Label: What This Means
Meaning: The National Drug Code (NDC) reported on the claim does not match the HCPCS/CPT drug code (typically a J-code) billed on the same service line.
Important Distinction:
N846 does not automatically mean the drug is not covered or the claim is permanently denied.

NDC - Drug Look Reference Image

Label: What This Means
Meaning: The Unit of Measure (UOM) reported alongside the NDC on the claim is either missing, invalid, or does not match how the drug was supplied and administered.
Important Distinction:
N816 does not mean the drug is not covered.
